name: RK Beach
description: RK Beach is one of the most famous beaches in Visakhapatnam known for scenic coastline and tourism.

name: Rushikonda Beach
description: Rushikonda Beach is a pristine, blue-flag certified beach famous for its golden sands and thrilling water sports.

name: Yarada Beach
description: Surrounded by lush green hills on three sides, Yarada Beach offers a tranquil and exceptionally scenic getaway away from the crowds.

name: Bheemunipatnam Beach
description: Located at the confluence of the Gosthani River and the sea, this beach features historic remnants of Dutch fort settlements and a peaceful coast.

name: Marina Beach
description: Marina Beach is the longest natural urban beach in the country, bustling with rich local culture, historical statues, and endless food stalls.

name: Elliot's Beach
description: Also known as Besant Nagar Beach, Elliot's Beach is a cleaner, calmer alternative to Marina, popular among youth and families alike.

name: Mahabalipuram Beach
description: A beautiful shore overlooking historic UNESCO heritage rock-cut temples and dynamic surf waves.

name: Kovalam Beach
description: A prominent surfing destination on the East Coast Road, known for its active surf schools and serene, clean sands.

name: Kovalam Beach
description: An internationally renowned beach destination in Kerala featuring an iconic red-and-white striped lighthouse and three adjacent crescent beaches.

name: Varkala Beach
description: Famous for its unique, towering red laterite cliffs bordering the Arabian Sea and natural mineral springs believed to have holy healing powers.

name: Cherai Beach
description: A picturesque shallow beach where the backwaters meet the sea, frequently offering glimpses of playful dolphins near the coast.

name: Bekal Beach
description: A majestic and well-maintained beach overlooked by the historic, keyhole-shaped Bekal Fort.

name: Baga Beach
description: One of North Goa's most energetic beaches, famous for its nonstop nightlife, bustling night markets, and thrilling watersports.

name: Calangute Beach
description: Known as the 'Queen of Beaches', Calangute is a massive, flagship Goan beach packed with shacks, souvenir shops, and endless activity.

name: Anjuna Beach
description: A bohemian paradise known for its striking black rock formations, alternative hippie vibe, and the famous weekly Wednesday flea market.

name: Palolem Beach
description: A beautiful crescent-shaped beach in South Goa flanked by a dense forest of coconut palms and calm, swimmable waters.

name: Colva Beach
description: A long stretch of fine white sand in South Goa, blending local fishing culture with modern beach amenities and water sports.

name: Mandrem Beach
description: A quiet, upscale, and incredibly peaceful beach in North Goa, ideal for travelers seeking wellness, solitude, and pristine sands.

name: Juhu Beach
description: Mumbai's iconic upscale beach, famous for its bustling atmosphere, legendary street food scene, and celebrity sightings nearby.

name: Girgaon Chowpatty
description: Located at the northern end of Marine Drive, this vibrant beach is best known for its grand Ganesh Visarjan celebrations and evening carnival air.

name: Mandvi Beach
description: A clean, historical beach featuring white sands, traditional wooden ship-building yards nearby, and the stunning Vijay Vilas Palace complex.

name: Puri Beach
description: A sacred and popular beach destination on the Bay of Bengal, famous for its annual sand art festivals and proximity to the Jagannath Temple.

name: Chandrabhaga Beach
description: A clean, peaceful beach holding blue-flag eco-certification, located close to the world-famous Konark Sun Temple.

name: Gopalpur Beach
description: An old historic port town turned quiet resort beach, recognizable by its vintage lighthouse and peaceful, uncrowded coastline.

name: Radhanagar Beach
description: Consistently rated among Asia's finest beaches, Radhanagar boasts breathtaking turquoise waters, perfect white sands, and a dense rainforest backdrop.

name: Elephant Beach
description: A vibrant coral reef destination reachable by boat or forest trek, perfect for marine life lovers and adventure sports.

name: Kanyakumari Beach
description: The unique southern tip of mainland India where the Arabian Sea, Bay of Bengal, and Indian Ocean meet, legendary for sunrise and sunset views.
